notes:
## Highlights

- Improved OpenAI- and Anthropic-compatible provider reliability for Bedrock-style gateways, including automatic tool-schema compatibility fallback and safer retry behavior.
- Added multiple API key rotation for OpenAI and Anthropic providers when a key is rejected or rate-limited.
- Improved session recovery after transient provider failures and kept provider health probes tool-free for broader gateway compatibility.
- Refined the requirements experience with clearer checkbox selection, a viewport-fixed progress rail, and improved dark-mode control contrast.
- Restored project workpath deletion and fixed cross-platform file listing behavior.

## Upgrade notes

- No configuration or data migration is required.
- This Windows-first release includes the Windows x64 installer and signed Tauri updater assets. macOS and Linux packages will be appended from their native build machines.
- The Windows installer is protected by the Tauri updater signature but is not Authenticode-signed, so manual downloads may show a SmartScreen or unknown-publisher warning.
